title: B@eroth #0885
definition:
Beeroth Bene-Jaakan or Beeroth = "wells" or "wells of the sons of Jaakan"

 1) an encampment for Israel in the wilderness probably in the country of
    the Horites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beeroth Bene-Jaakan or Beeroth = "wells" or "wells of the sons of Jaakan"

 1) an encampment for Israel in the wilderness probably in the country of
    the Horites

    NASB:  wells of (the) sons of Jaakan, a place in the desert
